biography: Riku, notably the brother of fellow competitor Panu, made a singular appearance in the Hector Trophée. His participation offered a brief, yet distinct, chapter in the tournament's history, showcasing his talent on the prestigious links.

During his lone outing, Riku diligently competed through the rigorous multi-day format, which encompasses both individual and pair challenges. Despite his concerted efforts, he did not manage to claim either the coveted Hector Trophée for the triumphant pair or the individual Victor Trophy, underscoring the formidable challenge presented by the tournament's elite field.

Subsequent to this solitary engagement, Riku has concluded his involvement in Hector events and will not be among the field for the Hector Trophée 2026. While his presence on the Hector Trophée stage was brief, his familial connection ensures his name is intrinsically woven into the tournament's evolving narrative.
